TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_Tanah_Tunux, title = Kari_Tanah_Tunux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_Tanah_Tunux} }

S.FORM: Kari Tanah Tunux uxe de kesun daha Kari Nihong we (Kari Tanah Tunux:śó•śú¨Ť™ěÔľŹ„Āę„ĀĽ„āď„ĀĒ Nihongo), we kingal klegan na krkari Tanah Tunux . Mrengo kari Tanah Tunux ka seediq Tanah Tunux ma Poryo. 13000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Tanah Tunux. Alang skari Kari Tanah Tunux Tanah Tunux Poryo Dndulan Kari Kari Hachijo Kari Tanah Tunux tnarac Kari Tanah Tunux tuiril Kari Kyushu Patis Kana Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Hengak Laqi Duma kari Tanah Tunux Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran . "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak
S.PHON: ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi nińßoŇč w…ô (ka…ĺi tanańß tunux:******** nińßoŇčo), w…ô kiŇčal kl…ôgan na k…ĺka…ĺi tanańß tunux . m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ka s…ô…ôdiq tanańß tunux ma po…ĺjo. ***** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi tanańß tunux. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tanańß tunux po…ĺjo dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi ńßa ¶ńßi…üo ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tna…ĺa ¶ ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tui…ĺil ka…ĺi kjusńßu patis kana pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu ńß…ôŇčak laqi duma ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan . "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak
S.FORM: Kari Tanah Tunux uxe de kesun daha Kari Nihong we (Kari Tanah Tunux:śó•śú¨Ť™ěÔľŹ„Āę„ĀĽ„āď„ĀĒ Nihongo), we kingal klegan na krkari Tanah Tunux . Mrengo kari Tanah Tunux ka seediq Tanah Tunux ma Poryo. 13000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Tanah Tunux. Alang skari Kari Tanah Tunux Tanah Tunux Poryo Dndulan Kari Kari Hachijo Kari Tanah Tunux tnarac Kari Tanah Tunux tuiril Kari Kyushu Patis Kana Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Hengak Laqi Duma kari Tanah Tunux Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran . "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak
S.PHON: ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi nińßoŇč w…ô (ka…ĺi tanańß tunux:******** nińßoŇčo), w…ô kiŇčal kl…ôgan na k…ĺka…ĺi tanańß tunux . m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ka s…ô…ôdiq tanańß tunux ma po…ĺjo. ***** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi tanańß tunux. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tanańß tunux po…ĺjo dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi ńßa ¶ńßi…üo ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tna…ĺa ¶ ka…ĺi tanańß tunux tui…ĺil ka…ĺi kjusńßu patis kana pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu ńß…ôŇčak laqi duma ka…ĺi tanańß tunux ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan . "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak
